ddls:
CREATE TABLE "productions" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the production was released or aired */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the production */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the production */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the production */,
  "actual_spend" TEXT /* Actual spend for the production */,
  "production_type" TEXT /* Type of production (Film, TV Show, Theater) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the production (Pre-production, Production, Post-production, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the film belongs to */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the film */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the film was released */,
  "box_office_revenue" TEXT /* Box office revenue of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language(s) in which the film was produced */,
  "country_of_production" TEXT /* Country where the film was produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "television_shows" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each television show */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the show belongs to */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the show */,
  "seasons" INTEGER /* Number of seasons */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date the show first aired */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network or streaming platform where the show is aired */,
  "episode_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of an episode */,
  "seasons_planned" INTEGER /* Number of seasons planned */,
  "final_season" TEXT /* Indicates if the current season is the final one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_television_shows_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theater_productions" (
  "theater_production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater production */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the show belongs to */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the show */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the theater */,
  "premiere_date" TEXT /* Date the theater production premiered */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the theater production closed */,
  "number_of_performances" INTEGER /* Total number of performances */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theater_productions_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Actor's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Actor's nationality */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the actor's agent */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Actor's contact number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor playing the role */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number (if applicable) */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number (if applicable) */,
  "episode_air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production team */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team's responsibilities */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the team is based */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_teams_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the crew member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the crew member belongs to */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the crew member */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the crew member */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production (e.g., pre-production, production, post-production) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the status */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the status */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the current phase */,
  "completed_tasks" INTEGER /* Number of completed tasks in the current phase */,
  "total_tasks" INTEGER /* Total number of tasks in the current phase */,
  "progress_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of progress in the current phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_status_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, director, administrator) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* User's nationality */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* User's contact number */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the production */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the production was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "granted_on" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)
